use_cases: Main application navigation for SaaS products and project management tools
Organizing multi-level menu options for projects, teams, and settings
Desktop-first application navigation with nested submenu support
Providing quick access to common actions like creating projects or managing teams
ai_summary: A horizontal app menu bar component built with Radix UI primitives featuring dropdown menus with nested submenus for organizing projects and teams. Styled with Tailwind CSS in a clean minimalist aesthetic with subtle shadows and borders. Designed for desktop SaaS applications requiring organized navigation hierarchies with keyboard accessibility support.
